archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) data clarity
design_philosophy: Quiet luxury for UHNW individuals. High trust, exclusive boutique feel. Deep blacks, crisp 1px borders, subtle gold/amber accents, and optical clarity glassmorphism.

colors.border: zinc-800/80 (#27272a) and zinc-800/40 for delicate inner lines

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-6 to p-8 for standard cards, p-12 for hero sections.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Mode B: 'Control Room' Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-6. Use col-span-2 or 3 for main data, col-span-1 for summaries.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse style layouts for technical tables. 1px solid borders on everything to ground the soft shadows.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons/badges (premium feel).

surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glass: bg-zinc-950/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5
surface_strategies.cards: Neumorphic/Tactile hybrid: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800/50 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)]
surface_strategies.active_card: Tracing Beam effect: Subtle moving border gradient or static amber-500/20 glow with blur-md

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 text-zinc-950 hover:bg-amber-400 transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(245,158,11,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-50 border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-600 transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-2

components.badges: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 border border-zinc-700
components.tables: Shadcn Table heavily customized. border-b border-zinc-800/50. Hover states on rows: hover:bg-zinc-800/30. font-mono for numbers.
components.avatars: Circular, with 2px ring representing status (amber-500 for pending, emerald-500 for signed, border-zinc-800 for inactive).

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle lifts (-translate-y-0.5) and glow enhancements on cards.
motion_and_interaction.approval_action: Instead of a simple click, use a 'Slide to Sign' or 'Hold to Approve' interaction with a progress ring, mapped to a biometric or vault-unlock visual metaphor.

texture_background.description: Dark rough texture, use as a subtle overlay with opacity-10 or mix-blend-overlay on the main transaction detail background for depth.

key_views_instructions.1_multi_sign_dashboard: Build a Control Room bento grid. Top metrics: Pending Actions, Total Secured Assets, Threshold Status. Below: A list of active multi-sig requests requiring user's signature, highlighted with a subtle amber tracing beam.
key_views_instructions.2_signatories_management: A card-based list showing all authorized signers. Include a visual 'Threshold Configuration' slider (e.g., 3 of 5). Each signer card has an avatar, role (Admin, Signer, Viewer), and 'Last Active' timestamp.
key_views_instructions.3_transaction_approval_detail: The 'Jewel' feature. A beautifully spaced modal/page. Massive typography for the crypto amount. Left side: Vertical step-timeline (Initiated -> Risk Cleared -> Signatures -> Executed). Right side: Signer avatars overlapping, showing who approved (emerald check) and who is pending. Bottom: A luxurious 'Hold to Sign' or sliding button.
key_views_instructions.4_create_transaction: Minimalist, high-contrast form. Step 1: Destination. Step 2: Amount. Step 3: Select Required Signers. Use Shadcn forms but strip borders down to 1px zinc-800. Use monospaced font for wallet addresses.
key_views_instructions.5_activity_log: A dense, technical audit table. Columns: Time, Action, User, Hash (mono), Status. Strict grid borders (border-collapse). No soft shadows here, pure utility.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid. e.g., 'approve-tx-button', 'signer-avatar-1', 'm-of-n-slider'.
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure amber-500 on zinc-900 passes 4.5:1. Text over images MUST have text-shadow or a gradient overlay underneath.
